# Change history — output-meta-validator-reports.template

## v2.0.0 — 2026-05-15

Added Mode 4 (dimension-based review), Mode 5 (system-wide apply-mode review with Phase A-F ordering), --dim parameter support, cross-dependency coherence section, adherence summary, consumer impact section. Aligned with vision v12.

## v1.0.0 — 2026-03-20

Initial version — design validation, implementation validation, ecosystem audit
